name: Jupiter Mines Limited.
analysis: It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2800, stop A$0.2524, target A$0.3627 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
